name: Episode Package Template
purpose: Guide future AI episode package generation from written storyboard prompts.
rules: Keep stories kid-friendly — appropriate for ages 2 to 8.
Use the official character canon for every character.
Keep Tiki mischievous and dramatic but never scary or harmful.
Make each story simple, visual, and easy to animate.
Every episode should end with a clear lesson or positive message.
Stories should feel warm, playful, and tropical.
Keep dialogue short and expressive — these are animated shorts.
Each scene should be visually distinct and easy to illustrate.
